name: Dunes Golf and Bar
about: Dunes Golf & Bar is an indoor golf venue offering cutting-edge golf simulators and a bar. The facility provides a sophisticated and relaxed atmosphere for both enthusiasts and beginners. Located in Georgetown Township, it combines state-of-the-art technology with a social gathering space. The venue allows players to perfect their game, enjoy it with friends, family, and co-workers, and is positioned as a community hub with a well-curated selection of drinks.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art all-weather golf simulators available year-round
Social atmosphere ideal for gatherings, networking, and unwinding
Analytics and technology to improve skills and see real progress

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with a well-curated selection of drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Golfzon simulators are used for indoor golf simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not specified whether club rentals are available; guests are encouraged to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a well-curated selection of food and drinks on-site. BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all ages.
